artPrompt: A low scrubby ridge above the burning town square, scattered with toppled blank ballot boxes and drifts of loose paper caught mid-flutter, faint bonfire glow climbing the slope from below; no central figure, only the weary hill holding its endlessly disputed count under ember-red haze and night-black smoke, melancholic and dreamlike, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Recount Ridge
text:
Recount Ridge enters the battlefield tapped, because there was a recount.
When Recount Ridge enters the battlefield, flip a coin. If you win the flip, demand another recount and flip again. (Yes, you may keep going. No, the other players will not be happy.)
{T}: Add {R}.
flavorText: Officials have certified the results four times. The results keep un-certifying themselves.
